description: A forensics investigator must analyze a disk image from a compromised server to determine what data was stolen.

nodes.task_description: Create a forensic image (bit-for-bit copy) of the compromised server's hard drive.

expected_outcome.value: Investigator successfully creates a valid disk image without altering the original evidence.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the file system timeline to identify files that were recently accessed or created by the attacker.

expected_outcome.value: Investigator identifies a suspicious ZIP file created just before the breach was detected.

nodes.task_description: Carve the suspicious ZIP file from the disk image and analyze its contents to determine the scope of the data exfiltration.

expected_outcome.value: Investigator recovers the ZIP file and confirms it contains sensitive customer data.
